creator: jkim@FreeBSD.org
text:
Please repo-copy www/nspluginwrapper to www/nspluginwrapper-devel, i.e.,

www/nspluginwrapper/Makefile                            -->     www/nspluginwrapper-devel/Makefile
www/nspluginwrapper/distinfo                            -->     www/nspluginwrapper-devel/distinfo
www/nspluginwrapper/files/patch-configure               -->     www/nspluginwrapper-devel/files/patch-configure
www/nspluginwrapper/files/patch-src-npw-config.c        -->     www/nspluginwrapper-devel/files/patch-src-npw-config.c
www/nspluginwrapper/files/patch-src-npw-wrapper.c       -->     www/nspluginwrapper-devel/files/patch-src-npw-wrapper.c
www/nspluginwrapper/files/patch-ulimit                  -->     www/nspluginwrapper-devel/files/patch-ulimit
www/nspluginwrapper/pkg-descr                           -->     www/nspluginwrapper-devel/pkg-descr
www/nspluginwrapper/pkg-message                         -->     www/nspluginwrapper-devel/pkg-message
www/nspluginwrapper/pkg-plist                           -->     www/nspluginwrapper-devel/pkg-plist

Thanks!

Jung-uk Kim
